add-file-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add File Attachment to PDF
add-file-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load an existing PDF, create a FileSpecification for a file, embed it as a FileAttachmentAnnotation on a page, and save the updated document.

embed-file-from-byte-array-into-pdf.title: Embed a File from Byte Array into a PDF
embed-file-from-byte-array-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a FileSpecification from a byte array using a MemoryStream and attach it to a PDF page as a file attachment annotation, then save the modified document.

add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.title: Add Multiple Attachments to a PDF
add-multiple-attachments-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate a collection of file paths, embed each file as an attachment, and save the updated document.

add-file-attachments-with-custom-descrip.title: Add File Attachments with Custom Description and MIME Type
add-file-attachments-with-custom-descrip.description: Demonstrates how to attach files to a PDF, set a custom description (tooltip) and let Aspose.Pdf infer the MIME type from the file extension, then save the document.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.title: Add File Attachment to PDF and Save to Output Folder
add-file-attachment-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, embedding an external file as an attachment using FileSpecification, and saving the updated PDF to a specified output directory.

list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.title: List PDF Attachments with Names and Sizes
list-pdf-attachments-names-sizes.description: Opens a PDF, accesses its EmbeddedFiles collection, iterates through each attachment, and prints the original file name and size in bytes.

extract-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.title: Extract Embedded Attachment from PDF
extract-embedded-attachment-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate an embedded file in a PDF by its name and save it to a target directory using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.title: Extract PDF Attachments to Separate Subfolders
extract-pdf-attachments-to-subfolders.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its embedded files, and save each attachment into its own subfolder on disk.

remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.title: Remove PDF Attachment by Index
remove-pdf-attachment-by-index.description: Shows how to delete an embedded file from a PDF using its zero‑based index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.title: Delete PDF Attachment by Filename
delete-pdf-attachment-by-filename.description: Demonstrates how to remove an embedded file from a PDF by specifying its filename using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.title: Extract PDF Attachment Metadata to JSON
extract-pdf-attachment-metadata.description: Shows how to read file attachment annotations from a PDF, obtain each attachment's filename and creation date, and serialize the collected metadata to a JSON file.

update-attachment-description.title: Update Attachment Description in PDF
update-attachment-description.description: Demonstrates how to locate a file attachment annotation in a PDF, modify its description, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-attachment-to-password-protected-pdf.title: Add Attachment to Password-Protected PDF
add-attachment-to-password-protected-pdf.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a user password, embedding a file as an attachment, and saving the PDF while preserving its encryption.

extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.title: Extract Attachments from Encrypted PDF
extract-attachments-from-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, decrypt it, and extract all embedded file attachments to a specified folder.

validate-attachment-size-before-adding-t.title: Validate Attachment Size Before Adding to PDF
validate-attachment-size-before-adding-t.description: The example checks that a file to be attached does not exceed a defined size limit, then adds it as a FileAttachment annotation to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.title: Batch Add Attachment to PDFs
batch-add-attachment-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through a directory of PDF files and embed the same external file as an attachment into each document using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-pdf-attachments-zip.title: Batch Extract PDF Attachments and Create a ZIP Archive
batch-extract-pdf-attachments-zip.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDFs, extract embedded files with Aspose.Pdf, and package all extracted attachments into a single ZIP archive.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to create a PDF portfolio and embed existing files such as PDFs, DOCX, and images as attachments using Aspose.Pdf.

add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Word Document to PDF Portfolio
add-word-document-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to embed a Word (.docx) file into a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf's EmbeddedFiles collection.

insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Insert Excel Workbook into PDF Portfolio with Description
insert-excel-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF portfolio, embed an Excel workbook as an attachment, and assign a custom description using Aspose.Pdf.

embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.title: Embed Image into PDF Portfolio with Display Name
embed-image-into-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF portfolio, embed an image file as an attachment, and set a custom display name for the embedded file using Aspose.Pdf.

add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.title: Add Nested PDF to an Existing PDF Portfolio
add-nested-pdf-to-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to embed another PDF file as a nested item inside an existing PDF Portfolio using Aspose.Pdf. The example loads the portfolio, creates a FileSpecification for the nested PDF, adds it to the EmbeddedFiles collection, and saves the updated document.

add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.title: Add Multiple Files to PDF Portfolio
add-multiple-files-to-pdf-portfolio.description: Creates a PDF portfolio and embeds every file from a specified folder into the document using a single loop.

compress-pdf-portfolio-optimization.title: Compress PDF Portfolio Using Optimization Options
compress-pdf-portfolio-optimization.description: Loads an existing PDF portfolio, enables object compression via OptimizationOptions, and saves the compressed PDF.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF portfolio with Aspose.Pdf, enumerate its embedded files, preserve any folder hierarchy encoded in the file names, and save each attachment to a structured directory.

extract-embedded-portfolio-item.title: Extract Embedded Portfolio Item by Index
extract-embedded-portfolio-item.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve a single embedded file from a PDF portfolio using its 1‑based index and save it with its original filename and extension.

remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.title: Remove Embedded File from PDF Portfolio by Index
remove-embedded-file-from-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to delete a specific embedded file from a PDF portfolio using its collection index with Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pdf-outline-items-by-title.title: Delete PDF Outline Items by Title
delete-pdf-outline-items-by-title.description: Demonstrates how to remove outline (bookmark) entries from a PDF by matching their title text instead of using an index.

reorder-pdf-outline-items.title: Reorder PDF Outline (Bookmark) Items
reorder-pdf-outline-items.description: Shows how to capture existing PDF outline (bookmark) entries, delete them, and re‑add them in a new order while preserving actions and destinations.

apply-custom-visual-template-to-pdf-port.title: Apply Custom Visual Template to PDF Portfolio
apply-custom-visual-template-to-pdf-port.description: Shows how to add a full‑page graphical background and a header text to each page of an existing PDF Portfolio using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing classes.

add-thumbnails-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Thumbnails to PDF Pages
add-thumbnails-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates generating a thumbnail image for each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's ThumbnailDevice and embedding the image onto the page with the Drawing API.

merge-pdf-portfolios-preserving-metadata.title: Merge PDF Portfolios Preserving Metadata
merge-pdf-portfolios-preserving-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to combine two PDF Portfolio files into a single document while keeping all embedded items and their metadata intact using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-portfolio-with-embedded-files.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Embedded Files
create-pdf-portfolio-with-embedded-files.description: Demonstrates how to convert an existing PDF into a portfolio by adding multiple embedded files using Aspose.Pdf.

flatten-pdf-portfolio.title: Flatten PDF Portfolio to Standard PDF
flatten-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to open a PDF portfolio, remove interactive form fields and annotations by flattening, and save it as a regular PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.title: Read PDF Metadata and Count Embedded Attachments
read-pdf-metadata-attachment-count.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract standard document metadata, count embedded file attachments, and generate a text report.

generate-csv-report-of-pdf-attachments.title: Generate CSV Report of PDF Attachments
generate-csv-report-of-pdf-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to extract embedded file information (name, size, description) from a PDF document and write it to a CSV report.

add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add In-Memory Attachment to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
add-in-memory-attachment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF directly from a MemoryStream, avoiding any temporary files on disk.

attach-remote-file-to-pdf.title: Attach Remote File to PDF as File Attachment Annotation
attach-remote-file-to-pdf.description: Downloads a file from a remote URL into memory and embeds it in a PDF as a file attachment annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Error Handling
add-file-attachment-to-pdf-with-error-ha.description: Demonstrates verifying the existence of a PDF and an attachment file, then adding the attachment as a FileAttachmentAnnotation to the first page using Aspose.Pdf, with comprehensive error handling.

add-file-attachment-with-mime-validation.title: Add File Attachment with MIME Type Validation to PDF
add-file-attachment-with-mime-validation.description: The example verifies that a file's extension maps to an allowed MIME type before embedding it as an attachment in a PDF. It then adds the file to the document's embedded files collection and creates a visible file attachment annotation.

measure-attachment-performance.title: Measure Performance of Adding, Extracting, and Removing PDF Attachments
measure-attachment-performance.description: Demonstrates how to add a file attachment annotation, extract embedded files, and remove attachments from a PDF while logging the time taken for each operation.

embed-attachment-and-metadata.title: Embed Attachment and Custom Metadata into PDF
embed-attachment-and-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file as an attachment in a PDF and add custom metadata about the attachment to the document information dictionary, then save the PDF with those options.

add-unicode-filename-attachment-to-pdf.title: Add Unicode Filename Attachment to PDF
add-unicode-filename-attachment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to attach a file to a PDF with a Unicode filename using Aspose.Pdf, creating a file attachment annotation and saving the document.

extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA‑256 Hashes
extract-pdf-attachments-sha256.description: The example opens a PDF, enumerates its embedded files, extracts each attachment, and calculates a SHA‑256 hash for integrity verification.

add-pdf-attachment-with-retry.title: Add File Attachment to PDF with Retry on Network Share
add-pdf-attachment-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to attach a file to the first page of a PDF stored on a network share and implement a retry mechanism for transient I/O errors.

extract-pdf-attachments-in-parallel.title: Extract PDF Attachments in Parallel
extract-pdf-attachments-in-parallel.description: Shows how to process multiple PDF files concurrently and extract their embedded attachments using Aspose.Pdf, with reflection‑based fallback handling for saving files.

verify-pdf-size-increase-after-adding-fi.title: Verify PDF Size Increase After Adding File Attachment
verify-pdf-size-increase-after-adding-fi.description: Creates a PDF, adds a FileAttachmentAnnotation, saves the modified document, and asserts that the file size grows compared to the original PDF.

test-attachment-removal-updates-collecti.title: Test Attachment Removal Updates Collection Count
test-attachment-removal-updates-collecti.description: Shows an integration test that verifies removing attachments from a ThreadMessageResponse correctly updates the Attachments collection count.

embed-hidden-xml-metadata-attachment.title: Embed Hidden XML Metadata as PDF Attachment
embed-hidden-xml-metadata-attachment.description: Shows how to serialize XML metadata to a memory stream, wrap it in a FileSpecification, and embed it as a hidden file attachment annotation in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
